typecheck.command: go build -o test-output ./cmd/server; if (Test-Path 'test-output.exe') { Remove-Item -Force 'test-output.exe' } elseif (Test-Path 'test-output') { Remove-Item -Force 'test-output' }

lint.command: $base = git merge-base HEAD origin/dev; $range = "$base...HEAD"; $files = git diff --name-only $range -- '*.go'; foreach ($f in $files) { gofmt -l $f }

blockingIssues.description: Full test suite failed. Reproduced failures in test/thinking_conversion_test.go (unused import "strings"), internal/registry/model_registry_safety_test.go (TestLookupModelInfoReturnsCloneForStaticDefinitions), and six internal/runtime/executor prompt-handling tests already called out in the F-1.2 handoff.

Lint check for Go files changed on the milestone A branch reported formatting drift in internal/config/config.go, internal/config/config_cloak_levers_test.go, and internal/watcher/diff/config_diff.go. A temporary gofmt run cleared the lint output, but validators still failed because the test suite remained red.
